semantic.role: Pipeline stage module that constructs the reverse dependency index (dependency→dependents mapping) from index documents of tracked files.
responsibilities: Build and persist the reverse dependency index from index documents of all tracked files.
Leverage the file scanner to enumerate tracked files and read their index documents.
Cache built reverse edges in memory using indexCache and reverseEdges structures.
Support idempotent execution via manifest checkpoint (isReverseIndexComplete).
Report index read issues using reportIndexReadIssueOnce.
Write reverse index files to disk using the runtime IO system.
outOfScope: CLI command parsing or service orchestration.
Forward index generation or document parsing.
invariants: Every input index document must be compatible according to isCompatibleIndexDocument; incompatible documents trigger a warning and are skipped.
The stage must not execute if ctx.manifest.isReverseIndexComplete is already true.
The reverse index is built only from tracked files returned by ctx.scanner.getAllTrackedFiles.
The output reverse index is persisted as a file in the index directory per index document.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide reverse dependency indexing capability as a pipeline stage in the ArchSpine dependency graph engine.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial implementation of the reverse indexing stage.

publicSurface.description: Pipeline stage that builds and persists the reverse dependency index (dependent→dependency edges) for all tracked files. Used by the task runner during the indexing phase.
